5521.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension enabling reference relationships between NFTs forming a DAG.
5521.notes: Introduces referable NFTs (rNFTs) with referring/referred relationships and timestamps for tracking citation networks.

5528.one_line_summary: Escrow service extension for ERC-20 with refund capability.
5528.notes: Dual contract model: Payable and Escrow contracts for reversible token exchanges.

5539.one_line_summary: Decentralized registry for managing revocation lists via namespaces.
5539.notes: Role-based revocation management with delegation support; addresses PKI centralization issues.

5553.one_line_summary: Intellectual property representation on-chain with royalty structure tokens.
5553.notes: Separates IP registration from licensing; royalty portion tokens for multiple payment types.

5554.one_line_summary: NFT legal usage rights, remixing, and on-chain derivative/reproduction tracking.
5554.notes: Extends ERC-5218; tracks derivative works and reproductions; copyright owner field; commercial exploitation logging.

5559.one_line_summary: Cross-chain write deferral protocol for off-chain mutation storage.
5559.notes: Handles L2 and off-chain database handlers; EIP-712 signed mutations; reduces L1 gas costs.

5560.one_line_summary: Redeemable NFT extension signaling physical asset redemption.
5560.notes: Simple extension with redeem() function and isRedeemable() status check.

5564.one_line_summary: Standardized stealth addresses for private, non-interactive token transfers.
5564.notes: SECP256k1 with view tags; singleton ERC5564Announcer at 0x55649E01...; enables recipient privacy.

5568.one_line_summary: Machine-readable format for wallet-signaled required actions via revert reasons.
5568.notes: walletSignal24() and WalletSignal24 error; minimal 24-bit instruction IDs; extensible for future ERCs.

5570.one_line_summary: NFT-based digital receipts for physical purchases with JSON schema.
5570.notes: Receipt structure with vendor, items, taxes; backward compatible with ERC-721 metadata.

5573.one_line_summary: Sign-In with Ethereum extension (ReCaps) for capability delegation.
5573.notes: Adds informed consent and scoped capabilities on top of SIWE; ReCap URIs in resources array.

5585.one_line_summary: Separates NFT ownership from commercial usage rights authorization.
5585.notes: Allows multiple authorized users with specific rights and expiration; supports duration extension and right updates.

5604.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension for placing and removing security liens on NFTs.
5604.notes: addLienHolder() and removeLienHolder(); supports multiple lien holders; used for collateral/debt scenarios.

5606.one_line_summary: Multiverse NFT standard indexing related NFTs across multiple platforms.
5606.notes: Bundle/unbundle delegate NFTs; enables cross-platform asset interoperability; partial bundling support.

5615.one_line_summary: ERC-1155 supply extension with totalSupply() and exists() functions.
5615.notes: Minimal interface; does not implement ERC-165; compatible with OpenZeppelin ERC1155Supply.
